productDisplayName: Vans Men Classic Slip-On Black Shoes
description: A great slip-on shoe from vans, so comfortable, practical and durable you'll want to wear it every day. Built by skateboarders, for skateboarders, but loved by all for the perfect blend of classic cool and modern slick style. If you don't yet own a pair then this is a good place to start, and if you're already a Vans fan there's always room for one more great shoe in your closet. With a conservative upper, this slip-on will coordinate with all your outfits, while the lining gives this shoe a little stylish lift.UpperFabric upper for durability and comfortPadded collar and textile lining for extra comfortElasticated gussets on the sides of the tongue for easy insertion and removal of the feetBrand name on the back, on the lastingCushioned footbed for all day comfortMidsolePU midsole for better shock absorption with double foxingOutsoleRubber outsole for durabilityReverse waffle pattern for better gripShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not use a drier or store in direct sunlight
